name: Read Cleaning
description: Host/contaminant screening and non-destructive cleaned read staging with nf-core/detaxizer

inputs.name: Raw or unknown FASTQ reads
inputs.description: Active order read records marked raw or unknown
inputs.sourceDescription: Read records linked to selected order samples

outputs.name: Cleaned read candidates
outputs.description: Filtered FASTQ files staged for admin review. Promotion creates new active cleaned reads without deleting raw sources.
outputs.destinationDescription: Stored as run artifacts until an admin promotes them

outputs.name: Removed reads
outputs.description: Optional contaminant read output for audit/review
outputs.destinationDescription: Stored as run artifacts when output_removed_reads is enabled

outputs.name: Cleaning summary
outputs.description: Run-level detaxizer classification and filtering summary
outputs.destinationDescription: Stored as a run artifact for review and download

outputs.name: MultiQC report
outputs.destinationDescription: Previewable from the pipeline output page

steps.name: Classify Contaminant Reads
steps.description: Use Kraken2 and/or BBDuk to identify reads assigned to the configured contaminant taxon/reference.

steps.name: Filter Reads
steps.description: Remove reads identified as contamination and write filtered FASTQ files.

steps.name: Aggregate Report
steps.description: Build an HTML MultiQC report for review before promotion.
